_comment: This is the self-check a quote must pass before it can be marked as sent. Set enabled to false to switch a check off. Reword labels freely. If you add your own check (any new id), it becomes a manual tick-box on the quote screen.
label: Every key survey measurement is filled in (spa size, access width, distances)
If the survey says crane needed, crane hire is priced in the quote
Slab size in the quote matches the spa dimensions from the survey
Tight access is priced if the path is narrower than 1.1m
Scope description matches the survey notes (crane, dimensions)
Validity period and payment terms are set
Business details in Settings are real, not placeholders
